name: Tuna Club and Peppers
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
6 slices brioche or egg bread or good quality multi-grain bread
1/2 cup julienned roasted red or yellow bell peppers (fresh)
2 cups washed and dried fresh arugula leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until it becomes crisp.
2. In a bowl, combine mayonnaise with lemon juice, minced garlic, turmeric, ground cumin, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Pan grill the bread slices just until they are dry or lightly toasted.
4. Pan grill the tuna for 3 minutes on each side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
5. Remove the bacon to paper towels to drain excess grease.
6. To assemble, spread mayonnaise mixture on one side only of each bread slice.
7. Slice the tuna into thin diagonal pieces.
8. Place some arugula leaves at the bottom of a bread slice.
9. Arrange the bacon, peppers, and tuna over the arugula.
10. Top with another bread slice, spreading mayonnaise mixture side down.
11. Repeat steps 6-10 for the second sandwich.
Yield: 2 servings
